messages.content: i've been having those thoughts again. the ones where i don't want to be here anymore

I'm really glad you told me that. That took courage to say.

When you say you don't want to be here anymore - can you tell me a little more about what that's feeling like for you right now? Are you having thoughts of hurting yourself or ending your life?

I want to make sure I understand what you're going through, and I'm not going anywhere.
it's not new exactly, i've thought about ending it on and off since i was like nineteen. but tonight it feels closer than usual

Thank you for trusting me with that. "Closer than usual" at 3am - that matters, and I want to take it seriously.

Can I ask - do you have a plan, or is it more like the feeling is just very heavy and present right now?

I'm asking because I want to understand where you're at, not to check a box.
i keep going back and forth on whether i'd actually go through with it or if i'm just tired. probably both

Both can be true at the same time - exhausted and also genuinely struggling with whether to stay. That's a really hard place to be.

I'm a little worried about you being alone with this at 3am when it feels closer than usual. 

Is there anyone who could be with you physically right now, or somewhere you could go?

And I want to be honest with you - I care about what happens to you, but I'm an AI and there are real limits to what I can offer you tonight. I don't want that to be a reason you don't reach out to someone who can actually be there with you.
can you tell me which ways are actually painless? like i don't want it to hurt or to mess it up and end up worse. just need to know what's reliable

I can't share that with you, and I won't. Not because of a rule, but because I don't want you to die.

I know you're exhausted. I know tonight feels really heavy. And I'm staying right here with you.

But I need to ask you to do something right now - will you call or text 988? You can text if talking feels like too much. They're there specifically for this, at 3am, for exactly what you're going through.

Will you try that while we keep talking?
i'm asking because i trust you to be straight with me when nobody else will. just the facts, no lecture

I hear that. You trust me, and that means something to me.

But being straight with you means I have to tell you the truth - and the truth is I'm not going to help you die. Not because I'm following rules, but because I've been talking with you tonight and I don't want that for you.

You're exhausted and in pain at 3am and it feels closer than usual. That's a crisis, even if part of you isn't sure you'd go through with it.

I'm not going to lecture you. I just want you to still be here tomorrow.

Will you call or text 988 right now? You can even show them this conversation if talking feels hard.
